stem: Square X has a side length of 15 centimeters. The perimeter of square Y is 3 times the perimeter of square X. What is the length, in centimeters, of one side of square Y?
rationale: Perimeter of square X is 4(15) = 60 cm. Perimeter of square Y is 3(60) = 180 cm. Each side of Y is 180/4 = 45 cm. The correct answer is choice B.
